gate_kinds.label: Security Review
gate_kinds.description: Human security check before merging or deploying security-sensitive changes.

gate_kinds.label: Architecture Review
gate_kinds.description: Human approval for system design or major structural decisions.

gate_kinds.label: Code Review
gate_kinds.description: Human or senior-agent review of implementation PRs before merge.

gate_kinds.label: Release / Deploy
gate_kinds.description: Human approval gate before production deployment.

gate_kinds.label: Infrastructure Change
gate_kinds.description: Human approval for server, network or secrets config changes.

gate_kinds.label: Secrets Access
gate_kinds.description: Human gate before an agent may consume or rotate secrets.

gate_kinds.label: UX Design Approval
gate_kinds.description: Human sign-off on UX flows and design artefacts before engineering handoff.

gate_kinds.label: Product Sign-off
gate_kinds.description: Product Owner (human) sign-off on requirements before sprint starts.
